page_title: Keep Your Head Above The Mayhem
text:
"Keep Your Head Above The Mayhem" is a song from the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance. It is track 13 in the album Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/19800 

In the film, the song is featured during the clash between Evangelion Unit-02 (piloted by Mari) and the Tenth Angel.

Lyrics

 
In the battle of the bravest souls
Over evil shall the good prevail
If the universe is crashing down
Heed the chaos and then drown it out

Showing flashes of bravado
In a torrent of destruction
Keep your head above the mayhem
Clarity will be your weapon
As the blinded falter and die
